channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Antonio Ligabue, "Cani da caccia con paesaggio", (1956-1957)…
item.author: Kristi Beqiri (@kristibeqiri.bsky.social)
item.description:
Antonio Ligabue, "Cani da caccia con paesaggio", (1956-1957),
olio su tavola, 69,6×78,6 cm

Ligabue è stato talora soprannominato il Van Gogh italiano per i problemi psichici che lo attanagliarono in vita e forse anche per una lontana somiglianza rilevabile negli autoritratti.🎨
item.content:encoded:
Antonio Ligabue, "Cani da caccia con paesaggio", (1956-1957),
olio su tavola, 69,6×78,6 cm

Ligabue è stato talora soprannominato il Van Gogh italiano per i problemi psichici che lo attanagliarono in vita e forse anche per una lontana somiglianza rilevabile negli autoritratti.🎨

item.title: @ismua.bsky.social A huge thank you for another fun challen…
item.author: Papillon Doré (@papillondore20.bsky.social)
item.description:
@ismua.bsky.social
A huge thank you for another fun challenge. I loved every minute of it, even though it was tough at times. I learned so much and I'm really looking forward to the next one. Thank you for being an amazing host and for everything you do for us each day. Thanks for the GIFs too!
❤️
item.content:encoded:
@ismua.bsky.social
A huge thank you for another fun challenge. I loved every minute of it, even though it was tough at times. I learned so much and I'm really looking forward to the next one. Thank you for being an amazing host and for everything you do for us each day. Thanks for the GIFs too!
❤️

item.title: NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan, convicted based in part on forensic evidence now widely regarded as junk science, is officially a free man.

“I am flooded with relief,” one of his lawyers said.
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Former Louisiana death row inmate Jimmie “Chris” Duncan, convicted based in part on forensic evidence now widely regarded as junk science, is officially a free man.

“I am flooded with relief,” one of his lawyers said.

item.title: 米国最高裁、ジオフェンス令状には憲法上の保護が必要であると判断した。 US Supreme Court rules ge…
item.author: Hacker News JP (@hacker-news-jp.bsky.social)
item.description:
米国最高裁、ジオフェンス令状には憲法上の保護が必要であると判断した。
US Supreme Court rules geofence warrants require constitutional protections

🔺 388
💬 18
🔗 HN Post | Article
item.content:encoded:
米国最高裁、ジオフェンス令状には憲法上の保護が必要であると判断した。
US Supreme Court rules geofence warrants require constitutional protections

🔺 388
💬 18
🔗 HN Post | Article

item.title: NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org

item.title: BREAKING: The Supreme Court ruled that states can count mail…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description: BREAKING: The Supreme Court ruled that states can count mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day, a major blow to Trump’s efforts to restrict voting.
item.content:encoded: BREAKING: The Supreme Court ruled that states can count mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day, a major blow to Trump’s efforts to restrict voting.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Paraguay achieved one of th…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Paraguay achieved one of the greatest upsets of recent World Cup history to defeat Germany in a penalty shootout. Germany had never lost a World Cup shootout.

Germany: ❌ ✅ ✅ ❌ ✅ ❌
Paraguay: ✅ ✅ ✅ ❌ ❌ ✅
nyti.ms/4weQ9Zw
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Paraguay achieved one of the greatest upsets of recent World Cup history to defeat Germany in a penalty shootout. Germany had never lost a World Cup shootout.

Germany: ❌ ✅ ✅ ❌ ✅ ❌
Paraguay: ✅ ✅ ✅ ❌ ❌ ✅
nyti.ms/4weQ9Zw

item.title: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naru…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 6月29日 月曜日☁☀️ 室温30.2℃ ３連勤終了なり。。。 明日は休みなり。。 今日も暑かった〜🫠 梅雨の晴れ間は…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
6月29日 月曜日☁☀️
室温30.2℃
３連勤終了なり。。。
明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった〜🫠
梅雨の晴れ間はいいけど、暑すぎる…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
item.content:encoded:
6月29日 月曜日☁☀️
室温30.2℃
３連勤終了なり。。。
明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった〜🫠
梅雨の晴れ間はいいけど、暑すぎる…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵

item.title: ‎なっ…なんと ‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦 ‎ ‎そして…説教💦 ‎ ‎『何よ！ ‎たかがイタズラDMで …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎なっ…なんと
‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦
‎
‎そして…説教💦
‎
‎『何よ！
‎たかがイタズラDMで
引っ込むなよ〜』
‎
‎『男でしょうよ！』
‎
‎✳️あんたら女でしょ？
‎
‎『でも…
毘沙門天はイケて無いね』
‎
‎『私はもっと可愛らしいよね…』
‎
‎✳️自分で言えるツワモノすぎる💦
‎
‎長女の言葉が強烈だった…
‎
‎『お父さん、
家族愛を堂々と言えることは
‎カッコいいよ』
‎
‎『負けるな
私のスーパーお父さん！』
‎
‎そして…焼肉を奢らされた💦

よー高い肉を食べるの〜🤣
✳️ダイエット中では😆
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎なっ…なんと
‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦
‎
‎そして…説教💦
‎
‎『何よ！
‎たかがイタズラDMで
引っ込むなよ〜』
‎
‎『男でしょうよ！』
‎
‎✳️あんたら女でしょ？
‎
‎『でも…
毘沙門天はイケて無いね』
‎
‎『私はもっと可愛らしいよね…』
‎
‎✳️自分で言えるツワモノすぎる💦
‎
‎長女の言葉が強烈だった…
‎
‎『お父さん、
家族愛を堂々と言えることは
‎カッコいいよ』
‎
‎『負けるな
私のスーパーお父さん！』
‎
‎そして…焼肉を奢らされた💦

よー高い肉を食べるの〜🤣
✳️ダイエット中では😆
‎
‎

item.title: 📎 30州以上が連邦判事にチケットマスター解体を要請——ライブネーション独占訴訟、いよいよ最終局面へ https://…

item.title: Inmates overpowered correctional staff and took over parts o…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Inmates overpowered correctional staff and took over parts of a jail in eastern North Carolina early Monday, but the siege ended hours later when law enforcement officers entered the facility and seized control.
item.content:encoded: Inmates overpowered correctional staff and took over parts of a jail in eastern North Carolina early Monday, but the siege ended hours later when law enforcement officers entered the facility and seized control.

item.title: Venture capitalist Marc Andreessen, the one-time Democratic …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Venture capitalist Marc Andreessen, the one-time Democratic supporter who switched his allegiance to Trump, gets a spot with on a top Pentagon advisory board.
item.content:encoded: Venture capitalist Marc Andreessen, the one-time Democratic supporter who switched his allegiance to Trump, gets a spot with on a top Pentagon advisory board.

item.title: 今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀) It's my hubby birthday …
item.author: Hanachu (@dokikawahanachu.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀)

It's my hubby birthday so I drew his favourite, Katanagatari !

#art #artsky #fanart #katanagatari
#アナログ絵
item.content:encoded:
今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀)

item.title: 小学校の「算数」、「数学」への名称変更見送り（無料記事） www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO..…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
小学校の「算数」、「数学」への名称変更見送り（無料記事）
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

文科省が示した方針案によると「難しい教科だという印象を持たせるのではないか」といった委員からの慎重意見がありました。
item.content:encoded:
小学校の「算数」、「数学」への名称変更見送り（無料記事）
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

文科省が示した方針案によると「難しい教科だという印象を持たせるのではないか」といった委員からの慎重意見がありました。

item.title: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. Thi…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. This was a cool experience! The movie told its story entirely through music and visuals, it was unique and well executed! The soundtrack was nice as well, and the art style was beautiful with a vibrant color palette! It was a pleasant movie 😊
item.content:encoded: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. This was a cool experience! The movie told its story entirely through music and visuals, it was unique and well executed! The soundtrack was nice as well, and the art style was beautiful with a vibrant color palette! It was a pleasant movie 😊

item.title: Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising…
item.author: Veronica in the Fens ~ My Heart in Nature (@veronicainthefens.bsky.social)
item.description:
Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising over Ely Cathedral this evening. Seen from Little Downham outside of Ely, Cambridgeshire 😍🌝
I didn’t think it was going to shine through the clouds, but it certainly did 🙏🏻🥰
#Fullmoon #strawberrymoon #ElyCathedral #amazing #Wonderful
item.content:encoded:
Wow, that was truly amazing, the Strawberry Full Moon rising over Ely Cathedral this evening. Seen from Little Downham outside of Ely, Cambridgeshire 😍🌝
I didn’t think it was going to shine through the clouds, but it certainly did 🙏🏻🥰
#Fullmoon #strawberrymoon #ElyCathedral #amazing #Wonderful

item.title: #今月描いた絵を晒そう #fanart ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。 連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでく…
item.author: 羽成ふみ✍🏻お通販開店中（6月いっぱいまで） (@tokeruwakusei.bsky.social)
item.description:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#fanart
ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。
連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでくださってありがとうございました。）ステゴは次回があればもっと手癖もりもりで挑んでみたいです…。
item.content:encoded:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#fanart
ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。
連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでくださってありがとうございました。）ステゴは次回があればもっと手癖もりもりで挑んでみたいです…。

item.title: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Centu…
item.author: Tom Cox (@dj-acid-reflux.bsky.social)
item.description: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Century dovecote with a cow standing in front of it, surrounded by buttercups, looking like she has just dropped a debut album she is thoroughly proud of.
item.content:encoded: Very probably the best photo I've ever taken of a 16th Century dovecote with a cow standing in front of it, surrounded by buttercups, looking like she has just dropped a debut album she is thoroughly proud of.

item.title: The court’s ruling means state laws that allow ballots to be…

item.description: The court’s ruling means state laws that allow ballots to be received after Election Day can stand.

item.title: A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimina…
item.author: Dr. Lucky Tran (@luckytran.com)
item.description:
A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimination, but a group of Brazilians fans went to console him and Mexican fans made him soar. You gotta love the World Cup! ❤️🌎⚽️

Video: RÉCORD
item.content:encoded:
A Japanese fan broke down crying after his country's elimination, but a group of Brazilians fans went to console him and Mexican fans made him soar. You gotta love the World Cup! ❤️🌎⚽️

Video: RÉCORD

item.title: A melhor coisa que existe no futebol é pênalti do time dos o…

item.title: The Supreme Court refuses to hear Alan Dershowitz’s defamati…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The Supreme Court refuses to hear Alan Dershowitz’s defamation claim against CNN, effectively upholding long-standing protections for the news media when reporting on public figures.
item.content:encoded: The Supreme Court refuses to hear Alan Dershowitz’s defamation claim against CNN, effectively upholding long-standing protections for the news media when reporting on public figures.

item.title: One of Mt. Hood for #MountainMonday. Have a peaceful day. 🏔…
